narrative:
Norwalk City has 10,159 registered voters, with 60.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a clear Republican lean of 7.9 percentage points.
